name: Question Semantic Enrichment — Context + Archetype (executed)
scope_note: Executed the two dimensions C-1 found at 0% coverage (Context, Archetype). Deviated from blueprint order (did these before signal/capability) because they are purely additive, highest-confidence (derivable from existing structured fields), and the new differentiators. Signal backfill (C-2.1) + per-question capability/behavior (C-2.4) remain follow-on sub-phases (higher fabrication risk; need ontology mapping infra).

derivation.quality_gate: UNCLASSIFIED (confidence 0) when no evidence resolves — never fabricated

differentiation_before_after.method: realized = 1 - tag-size-weighted within-tag HHI; repository = mean realized across dims; contribution% = realized / Σrealized

same_basis_8dim.note: PRIMARY comparator — both sides on the same 8-dimension frame; Context+Archetype simply = 0 before they existed. Avoids the 6-vs-8 denominator shift.

framework_shifted_6dim_vs_8dim.note: secondary framing — mixes a /6 and /8 denominator; quoted for continuity with C-1A's 0.096.

delta.interpretation: Archetype is now co-dominant with dev_stage; differentiation is no longer carried by a single 5-value dimension. Context adds little WITHIN-tag (tag largely determines domain) — its value is cross-tag ROUTING, measured separately from this within-tag index.

honest_limitations: Context within-tag realized is low (0.079) by nature — a bridge tag mostly maps to one life-domain; context pays off in routing/relevance, not within-pool spread.
Context UNCLASSIFIED 16% are honest no-evidence rows, not fabricated.
primary_capability / primary_behavior still 0% (uniformity) and signal_family still 0% / 55.8% coverage — these are the deeper C-2.4 / C-2.1 sub-phases, not attempted here.
Projected post-full-C2 differentiability (~0.40-0.55, from C-1A) remains a projection; this phase delivers a MEASURED +56% from two dimensions only.
go_no_go_next: GO to C-2.1 (signal coverage backfill) + C-2.4 (per-question capability/behavior) — but each needs the ontology semantic-mapping path and a fabrication quality gate; recommend a dedicated follow-on with the same additive/reversible/measured discipline.
